criteria.text: A React app scaffold exists with routed pages/views corresponding to each of the five api/ gateway routes.
criteria.planned_check: Static: ui/src/App.tsx defines a <Routes> with exactly 5 <Route path> entries matching /ingest, /query, /graph, /files, /admin, each element referencing a distinct component in ui/src/routes/.
Run `npm run build` inside ui/ after `npm install`; must exit 0 and produce ui/dist/.

criteria.text: A router test asserts all five routes render without error using mocked API responses.
criteria.planned_check: ui/src/App.test.tsx: for each of the 5 paths, render <App/> inside <MemoryRouter initialEntries=[path]> with ui/src/api/mockClient mocked via vi.mock, assert the corresponding view's marker text is present and no error/rejection is thrown. Run `npm test` (vitest run), must exit 0 with 5 assertions (one per route) passing.

criteria.text: Route components remain minimal placeholders (no 6.1.2-6.1.4 real feature logic implemented in this commit).
criteria.planned_check: Manual diff review: IngestView/QueryView/GraphView/FilesView/AdminView.tsx each contain only a heading + short description + a stubbed mock-client call, no form submission handling, no graph rendering library, no catalog table.
